creator: jay.krell@cornell.edu
text:
If you install from the 3.3 CD, /stand/sysinstall and you select the package e<version, like 93> in one of the Tcl directories, the install hangs as the package thing prompts you over and over to say "y", I agree to the license.

Fix: 

Somehow prevent people from installing the package from /stand/sysinstall, or get owner to relax.
